subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath sent down unto him who hath witnessed and beheld the great signs of his Lord, and hath attained that which was recorded in the Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن شهد و رای آیات ربه الکبری و فاز بما کان مذکورا فی کتب
